message:
fix: three context management bugs (ForceCompact callbacks, SetModel profile, web search tokens)

1. ForceCompact now fires OnCompactionTurn for checkpoint and summary
   turns, matching MaybeCompact behavior. Without this, /compact loses
   the checkpoint on resume because the transcript never records it.

2. Session.SetModel now calls contextMgr.SetProfile so pressure
   estimation uses the new model's context window size instead of the
   stale original.

3. RecordInputTokens is skipped when the response contains
   ContentWebSearch parts. Anthropic's server-side web search makes
   multiple forward passes, reporting ~2x actual input tokens, which
   caused pressure overestimation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
